title: Mayotte, le 101e département français 🇫🇷✨
hook: Saviez-vous que la France compte un département caché entre l’Afrique et Madagascar ?

scenes.narration: Et devinez quoi ? Cette pépite est française depuis 1841, quand le sultan Andriantsoly l’a cédée à la France – une histoire qui a façonné les Mahorais d’aujourd’hui.
visuals: aerial shot of Mayotte island with turquoise lagoon and sandy beaches
close-up of old French colonial building with weathered wooden doors
historical painting style illustration of Sultan Andriantsoly signing treaty
wide shot of Mayotte flag flying next to French flag on official building
scenes.image_prompt: Photorealistic vertical 9:16 cinematic shot of Mayotte's coastline at golden hour, turquoise waters meeting white sandy beaches, lush green hills in background, French flag waving on a flagpole in foreground, official colonial-style building with white walls and wooden shutters, warm sunlight casting long shadows, ultra-detailed textures, hyper-realistic lighting, depth of field emphasizing the flag and building
scenes.fact_used: Elle est française depuis 1841 quand le sultan Andriantsoly l'a vendue à la France

scenes.narration: Imaginez : en 1841, le sultan Andriantsoly signe un accord et offre Mayotte à la France, posant la première pierre de ce département unique.
visuals: medium shot of historical document with wax seal and French signature
close-up of old map showing Mayotte labeled as French territory
portrait of Sultan Andriantsoly in traditional attire with neutral expression
wide shot of Mayotte’s coastline with small traditional boats in shallow water
scenes.image_prompt: Photorealistic vertical 9:16 cinematic shot of an ancient treaty document with a wax seal, quill pen resting on parchment, soft candlelight illuminating the text, close-up of Sultan Andriantsoly’s hand holding the document, traditional mahorais attire with intricate patterns, warm golden tones, shallow depth of field focusing on the wax seal
scenes.fact_used: Elle est française depuis 1841 quand le sultan Andriantsoly l'a vendue à la France

scenes.narration: Et en 1974, quand les Comores ont choisi l’indépendance, les Mahorais ont dit non à 63% : leur cœur était déjà français.
visuals: aerial shot of voting ballots being counted in a community hall
close-up of hands placing a ballot into a transparent voting box
medium shot of elderly Mahorais man smiling proudly holding a French flag
wide shot of a polling station with people waiting in line under shade trees
scenes.image_prompt: Photorealistic vertical 9:16 cinematic shot of a bustling polling station in Mayotte, people standing in line under large shade trees, ballots being dropped into transparent boxes, elderly Mahorais man in traditional attire holding a French flag with a proud smile, warm sunlight filtering through leaves, detailed textures of voting materials and clothing
scenes.fact_used: En 1974, Mayotte a voté à 63% pour rester française face à l'indépendance des Comores

scenes.narration: Et le 31 mars 2011, c’est officiel : les Mahorais deviennent fiers citoyens du 101e département français, sous le même drapeau.
visuals: wide shot of official ceremony with French and Mayotte flags side by side
close-up of a gavel striking a wooden block during the declaration
medium shot of local officials in suits applauding the announcement
aerial shot of crowds celebrating in Mamoudzou’s main square
scenes.image_prompt: Photorealistic vertical 9:16 cinematic shot of an official ceremony in Mamoudzou, Mayotte, French and Mayotte flags waving side by side, local officials in suits standing on a stage, a gavel striking a wooden block in close-up, crowds in the square cheering and waving flags, confetti falling from the sky, vibrant colors, dynamic lighting
scenes.fact_used: Mayotte est devenue le 101e département français le 31 mars 2011

scenes.narration: Avec une moyenne d’âge de 18 ans, les Mahorais forment aujourd’hui la population la plus jeune de tous les départements français.
visuals: aerial shot of bustling Mamoudzou market with colorful stalls and people
medium shot of young Mahorais students walking to school in uniforms
close-up of hands exchanging fresh produce at a market stall
wide shot of a modern school building with children playing in the yard
scenes.image_prompt: Photorealistic vertical 9:16 cinematic shot of Mamoudzou’s vibrant market, colorful stalls filled with fresh fruits and vegetables, young Mahorais students in uniforms walking through the crowd, hands exchanging goods, lively atmosphere with warm sunlight, ultra-detailed textures of market items and clothing
scenes.fact_used: Elle est le département le plus jeune de France et le plus peuplé d'Outre-mer après La Réunion

scenes.narration: Et avec plus de 300 000 habitants, les Mahorais composent aussi le département d’Outre-mer le plus peuplé juste après La Réunion.
visuals: aerial shot of dense neighborhoods with colorful houses in Mamoudzou
medium shot of families walking along a busy street in the evening
close-up of children playing soccer on a dirt field at sunset
wide shot of a crowded beach with people swimming and relaxing
scenes.image_prompt: Photorealistic vertical 9:16 cinematic shot of Mamoudzou’s dense neighborhoods at dusk, colorful houses stacked on hillsides, families walking along a busy street, children playing soccer on a dirt field, warm golden light casting long shadows, ultra-detailed textures of buildings and people
scenes.fact_used: Elle est le département le plus jeune de France et le plus peuplé d'Outre-mer après La Réunion

scenes.narration: Ici, c’est une identité qui s’écrit en arabe sur les murs des mosquées et en français dans les écoles, où les Mahorais vivent leur foi au quotidien avec sérénité.
visuals: aerial shot of a white mosque with a minaret against a blue sky
medium shot of women in colorful salouva dresses walking to prayer
close-up of hands turning prayer beads during a quiet moment
wide shot of a family gathered for iftar during Ramadan
scenes.image_prompt: Photorealistic vertical 9:16 cinematic shot of a beautiful white mosque in Mayotte, minaret reaching into a clear blue sky, women in vibrant salouva dresses walking toward the entrance, hands gently turning prayer beads, warm sunlight highlighting the intricate architecture, serene and peaceful atmosphere
scenes.fact_used: Plus de 95% de la population est de confession musulmane

scenes.narration: Et pourtant, dans les ruelles ou les marchés, ce sont bien les mots en shimaoré et kibushi qui bercent le quotidien des Mahorais depuis des générations.
visuals: medium shot of a classroom with children learning French from a teacher
close-up of a grandmother telling a story to children in shimaoré
wide shot of a market where vendors and customers chat in kibushi
aerial shot of a village where elders sit together conversing
scenes.image_prompt: Photorealistic vertical 9:16 cinematic shot of a lively market in Mayotte, vendors and customers chatting in kibushi, colorful stalls filled with fresh produce, children playing nearby, elders sitting under a tree conversing, warm sunlight filtering through leaves, ultra-detailed textures of market items and clothing
scenes.fact_used: Le français est la seule langue officielle, mais le shimaoré et le kibushi sont parlés au quotidien

scenes.narration: Ici, les Mahorais jonglent entre le français à l’école et leurs langues maternelles à la maison, un mélange unique qui fait vibrer l’île au quotidien.
visuals: close-up of a young Mahorais man switching between French and shimaoré in conversation
medium shot of a family dinner where different languages are spoken
wide shot of a group of teenagers laughing and mixing languages
aerial shot of a schoolyard where children play and speak multiple languages
scenes.image_prompt: Photorealistic vertical 9:16 cinematic shot of a family dinner in Mayotte, young Mahorais man switching between French and shimaoré while talking, elders listening and smiling, warm indoor lighting, colorful traditional dishes on the table, ultra-detailed textures of food and clothing
scenes.fact_used: Le français est la seule langue officielle, mais le shimaoré et le kibushi sont parlés au quotidien

scenes.narration: À Mayotte, le français danse avec le shimaoré et le kibushi, créant un mélange unique où traditions et modernité s’entremêlent chaque jour.
visuals: medium shot of a fisherman repairing his net while speaking on a smartphone
close-up of a woman weaving a traditional basket while watching TV
wide shot of a village with satellite dishes on traditional huts
aerial shot of a modern hospital next to a historic mosque

scenes.narration: En 1974, 63% des Mahorais ont choisi la France, un vote qui scelle leur double fierté : locale et nationale.
visuals: medium shot of a young Mahorais woman wearing a French flag as a cape
close-up of a tattoo combining French and Mahorais symbols
wide shot of a community event with French and Mayotte flags side by side
aerial shot of a mural depicting Mayotte’s history and French ties

scenes.fact_used: En 1974, Mayotte a voté à 63% pour rester française face à l'indépendance des Comores

scenes.narration: Imaginez : ici, les Mahorais parlent français à l’école, mais le soir, c’est en shimaoré ou kibushi qu’ils racontent leurs rêves sous les étoiles.

scenes.narration: Et depuis ce 31 mars 2011, les Mahorais portent haut les couleurs de la France, entre traditions vibrantes et cette fierté d’appartenir à la République.

close-up of a child drawing the French flag in school
wide shot of a national holiday celebration with fireworks over the lagoon
aerial shot of a sports event where the French anthem is played

scenes.fact_used: Mayotte est devenue le 101e département français le 31 mars 2011

scenes.narration: Ici, les Mahorais vivent au rythme d’un département où la jeunesse explose et où chaque rue bat au son d’une énergie unique en France.
